n: To Northcotton Farm: Restocking the Wine

steps.t: Northcotton Farm is in Oatbarton, north of Brockenborings at the top-most border of the Shire near Evendim. You should run to the farm and return with…
Sperling Took, the supplier of the Farmers Faire, can be found in Bywater. You should return to Bywater as quickly as you can, taking bites of the pie…
